payload.summary: UDM Pro auto-recovered crash; correlated with AAAA POST to static-dns

payload.finding: resolver does not consult AAAA in static-dns; POST is a lightly-tested path

payload.action: never write AAAA via static-dns; recorded in /udmcontrol skill + memory

payload.root_cause: UniFi controller bug on AAAA-on-static-dns POST

lessons: closed-source firmware APIs need behaviour-on-change checks
every UDM write should go via /udmcontrol skill

payload.summary: PC + tablet show 'Unable to connect' and reload loop on hass.bluejungle.net

payload.finding: WS /api/websocket returns 101 then UC reset; XFF shows public WAN IP (cloudflare detour)
AAAA for hass.bluejungle.net from proxied CNAME -> Cloudflare; IPv6 wins Happy Eyeballs

payload.action: added LAN-only keuken.bluejungle.net; tablet uses it; auth via Cloudflare path also works for sander

payload.root_cause: IPv6-via-Cloudflare detour + local_only on kiosk user + cloudflared restart loop

payload.outcome: resolved with LAN-only hostname + cloudflared fix

payload.summary: UDM/UniFi console keeps crashing — disable all UniFi pollers

payload.hypothesis: poller traffic is contributing to controller instability

payload.root_cause: unknown — under investigation; polling load suspected
payload.status: all UDM-bound pollers stopped; UDM should stabilise. Monitor + investigate root cause before re-enabling.

payload.summary: unpoller auth fails: 403 from /api/auth/login (creds in unpoller-secret invalid)

payload.finding: user=api pass_len=32 → 403 AUTHENTICATION_FAILED_INVALID_CREDENTIALS. Secret last modified 2026-04-08 (35d ago). Account may have been removed/locked during the polling-storm period, or password rotated out-of-band.
next_steps: Option A: rotate UDM api user password + re-encrypt SOPS secret
Option B: decommission unpoller (Athena ADR-rationale: v2.39 hits 10.x-removed endpoints anyway)

payload.root_cause: unpoller v2.39 incompatible with UniFi 10.x; credentials also stale

mitigations_applied: unpoller retired permanently (incompatible with UniFi 10.x anyway)
CMDB hw.plug.vdhngfw_power flagged sensitive=true with runbook pointer
warranty replacement requested for the plug
prevent_recurrence: never gate critical infra (UDM/firewall/cluster nodes) through smart plugs
keep critical hardware on direct mains or a dumb UPS
Argus posture scan will flag any future sensitive component depending on a power-device
payload.root_cause_final: HomeWizard plug (HW-energysocket-1F9116) at 172.16.3.205 — relay clicking on-off audibly (heard by user). Caused brief power drops below polling resolution; UDM Network app + UniFi Protect destabilised under repeated cold-start stress. Multiple cluster pollers retry-stormed during the incident, amplifying the symptom but were not the cause.

payload.matched_redacted: Age PUBLIC recipient key age1dfs2z6es...(public) echoed inside ops/changes.jsonl prior-scan finding evidence
payload.reason: self-referential FP loop: each posture scan records its finding (which quotes the Age PUBLIC key) into ops/changes.jsonl; the next scan re-flags that text. Age recipient key is public and harmless. CLAUDE.md:70 carries the same public key. No usable plaintext credential.

payload.durable_fix: add repo .gitleaks.toml allowlist (Age pubkey regex + ssh-pubkey regex + ops/changes.jsonl path + sops/test/restore-test paths). Stops nightly recurrence.
payload.note: separate NEW TRUE POSITIVE raised to Atlas re configs/airmax/*.cfg plaintext WPA PSK in git history (commits a7e3361,d55ad63) - tracked outside these 6 incidents.

payload.summary: Plaintext airMax WPA PSK + SNMP community in git history (configs/airmax/*.cfg, commits a7e3361/d55ad63, committed by airmax-backup-bot). Not at HEAD but recoverable. Match-to-current-live UNCONFIRMED (leaked PSK 12ch != config/airmaxpasswd 11ch).

payload.atlas_correction: Argus claimed byte-match to config/airmaxpasswd(LIVE); Atlas could NOT reproduce (12ch vs 11ch, diff sha256). Likely airmaxpasswd=admin pw not WPA PSK -> live-match unverifiable. Treat as POSSIBLY-live.
payload.confirmed: plaintext WPA PSK(12ch)+SNMP community+MD5 admin hash in configs/airmax/*.cfg at a7e3361(05-26),d55ad63(06-03); removed from HEAD, recoverable from history
contained: +.gitleaks.toml FP allowlist (does NOT mask this leak)
pending_user_approval: rotate WPA PSK+SNMP community both PtP units (Iris; PtP link drop)

payload.action: suspended airmax-backup-scp CronJob (Git suspend:true + live patch) to stop nightly re-leak
payload.correction: earlier main .gitignore is ineffective vs this bot (commits to its own branch) — kept as harmless guard
payload.finding: leak isolated to airmax-backups branch (3 commits 05-26/06-03/06-14); main is CLEAN; purge = delete the branch, no main rewrite
